title: BEM-840 route mobile-only
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=b839.get('missing',[])
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol for operator chat'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_result_proof'
    next_action='repair workflow_dispatch_results proof without operator UI; inspect processor marker/result writer'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='repair_claude_runtime_proof'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime state writer/dispatch target without operator UI'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='repair_real_claude_response_proof'
    next_action='repair Claude response generation/writer without asking operator to use computer'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_state'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-839 missing state'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':b839.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'operator_device_assumption':'mobile_only','operator_role':'no_ui_admin_actions','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_mobile_only.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_mobile_only.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Route After BEM-839 Mobile Only | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator is mobile-only; no computer/UI admin instructions.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator mobile-only: do not ask for computer or GitHub UI.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_mobile_only.json','governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_mobile_only.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-839 with explicit mobile-only operator constraint and no UI/admin dependency')
